title: Jayavarman VII - National Museum of Cambodia
highlights: Date: late XIIth - early XIIIth century Provenance: Krol Romeas, Angkor Thom (Siem Reap) Collection: National Museum of Cambodia, Phnom Penh B.347 B.19.1 Ka.1703 This statue is dated to the Bayon style. Portraiture art of this period is marked by smiling and mystical expression.
